subject: HR-AI Reschedule Request
body:
I have a medical emergency.
Can we reschedule?

body:

subject: [HR-AI]
body:
Hello HR,

I am unable to attend the interview tomorrow.

Could you please reschedule the interview?

Thanks,
John
reason: Candidate requests to reschedule the interview

subject: HR-AI interview timing problem
body:
Hi,

Something urgent has come up and I won't be able to make the current
interview slot.

Can we arrange another suitable time next week?

Thank you.

subject: Fwd: [HR-AI]
body:
Hello HR,

I am unable to attend the interview tomorrow.

Could you please reschedule the interview?

Thanks,
John
reason: Unable to attend the original interview time
